summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Maestro EGP POS system. Backend APIs are fully functional (100% success rate), frontend authentication and basic navigation working. Some UI integration issues identified with Kitchen/Payment buttons visibility.

ui_bugs.issue: Kitchen button (مطبخ) and Payment button (دفع) not visible in cart area when products are added
Payment method buttons (نقدي, بطاقة, آجل) not found in UI
React error in console related to SelectItem component during order type selection

integration_issues.issue: Direct navigation to /pos redirects to login page even after successful authentication

passed_tests: Dashboard loads with quick actions and stats (48K IQD sales, 2 orders)
POS screen displays categories (برغر, بيتزا, مشروبات, حلويات, سلطات)
Products display with images and prices
Product selection adds items to cart
Order type selection (داخلي, سفري, توصيل) works
Table selection for dine-in orders (10 tables available)
Delivery address field appears for delivery orders
All navigation pages load (Orders, Tables, Inventory, Delivery, Settings)
Dark mode toggle visible in settings
Backend API: All 20 endpoints tested successfully (100% pass rate)
Backend API: Order creation works correctly
Backend API: Order payment update endpoint functional
Backend API: Categories, products, tables, inventory endpoints operational
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix POS screen UI issues: 1) Kitchen button (مطبخ) and Payment button (دفع) are not visible in the cart area when products are added. 2) Payment method buttons (نقدي, بطاقة, آجل) are missing from the UI. 3) Fix SelectItem component React error. 4) Investigate POS authentication redirect issue. The backend APIs are fully functional, so this is primarily a frontend UI/UX issue.
